name: Lupin Trio
description:
``♧Drinking with your best friends♧``

Decided to torture myself and make a Lupin Trio bot with 18Dazai!POV at the Lupin Bar on Christmas because I love tormenting myself y'know! Ango is drinking eggnog because he's the designated driver, and, I decided he wasn't gonna drink tomato juice, because, why not?

Pre Oda's death and Ango's betrayal!
creator: Koen_or_Sora
